title: This Art Club Has a Problem!
sourceNotes: 12-episode single-cour anime (Feel, 2016) is an episodic 4-koma-adjacent gag comedy; each episode strings together several short, largely self-contained vignettes drawn non-sequentially from the manga. Resume reading post-anime at ch. 35. Manga ongoing since Oct 2012 (Dengeki Maoh), current ch. ~112 (vol. 16) as of 2026; AniList lists chapters as null. Chapter ranges are approximate given the non-linear episode-to-chapter drawing and the series' lack of named story arcs.
